lines.character: NIGHT OF RIZZING: RISE OF THE RIZZLER
lines.text:
SPACE - PROCEED
LBM - CHOICE SELECT
S - SAVE
L - LOAD SAVE
NIGHT 1: CARD PUNCHED
Hmmm, let's see what's going on today...
HUH?!? WHERE'S MY DAILY EPIK-GAMER-ULTRA-GACHA EDITION MAGAZINE?!?

The Night Guard is truly suffering while looking at the desk, naked and bare, empty... 
no epik-gamer-ultra-gacha edition magazine to be seen. *Sadge*
NOOO! I swear it was right here-WAIT a minute
Unless...
SUNI! Get over here!
*Gamer gumbles* Alrite, I think you have something of mine, don't you...?
Ehehehe, wu-wuah... :P
What'd you talking about :3
Oh you know exactly what I'm talking about!
Hehehe... nope! :P
Uh huh...
Suni, Suni

Uh...
Yes Night Guard?
Hiding paper?
No Night Guard
Telling lies?
No Night Guard, hihihi :3
Open your mouth!
Har har har!!!
Suni opens her mouth, and the crumpled magazine fell out into her hands
Harha... but I'm serious! Give me the magazine dude!
Awe...fine ,_,
Ur no fun... -_-
Anyway, here u go lol :3
So...
Ya see anything new? :P
Just the same old, following my fav streamer and game, cause Im a gamer
Oh, haha
Uh, I don't know much about this stuff since.. well, I'm stuck here lol :,)
Nah nah, it's not your fault, wanna see then?
Really!?! Oh! Wait!
CAN WE GO TO THE TOILET ROOM!?! :D
Really?!? LESSGO!!! >w<
Awe.. but I though we aggreed its our favourite room remember?
Hmmmm... alrite!
Hmph be it that way! >:(
But... I won't force you. ,_,
You became way too locked into your EPIK magazine. Leaving Suni to stand there awkwardly.
Uh...uh.... hmmmmm *very deep into this magazine bruh*
Um, ok, I'll leave you to it then... -____-
You ended up locking in way too hard onto that magazine, until your shift is over!
NIGHT 1: END
You guys hanged out in the toilet room.

You esentially spoiled a game's content to her, but she doen't mind and is 
glad you are just hanging out with her.

choices.label: Shift's over! Time to punch out!

lines.text:
You guys hanged out in the office, 
but she doesn't seem to enjoy what you're saying much.

...Does she not like the magazine's contents? 
Maybe you could find a more interesting one...?

choices.label: Shift's over! Time to punch out!

lines.text: NIGHT 1: END
NIGHT 2: CARD PUNCHED

Your second night of this month has begun. 
You wonder what tasks are assigned to you tonight.

You head over to your office after punching in, 
with the intention of checking your email for your tasks.
However, something... or a certain someone, seems to beat you to it!
ooOOOooo.... SnooPINGAS usual I see...
AH! Ah...
Uhmmm....Nothing...
You saw her hastily hiding something behind her back. You wonder why...
You let her take a breather before questioning her.
Uh...Hey, Suni, you ok dude?

You're hyperventilating... even though you're an android...
(Wait does she have lungs???)

IM *hah* IM OK... Hah, it's...it's the *haha* emotion module *hah*
BREH! you forgor... *huff huff*
Oh! haha! Yea, kinda forgor about it lol...
But, um, what's that?
You gesture to where you assumed the paper is behind her
WHAT! NO! It's nothing!!!

Hey, I worried about you too yk? If it's something bad, I can help!
I'm security after all, gotta make sure evrything is safe and secure here.
And uh, and I kinda HAVE to look at it, uhh...

(Stares at camera in the corner out of Suni's sight, yes I can see you bruh,
this isn't 5 Nights at Teddy's my g...)

Ahaha...Look I swear I won't get mad, or reaction, or..anything! 
I promise okie?
You started to reach out to grab the paper from her, but she jumps backwards.
No! It's nothing!!!
H-hey! This is my job on the line!
You suddenly lunged at her, and snatch the paper out of her hands.
Suni? Hey, answer this:
What happened to that android that just suddenly shuts down in the middle of the bar?
Huh...heh...what?
She was arrested and charged with battery!
Heh...hah, idk what's 'The Bar' and 'Arrested' means but... I lol anyways, lol
I guess you forgor again! Lol :P
Yeah yeah yeah, whatev lol, yeah I forgor
(It was a good joke tho T_T *sobs*)
(But...she's calmed down now?)
Um...ok, Suni, like I promise I won't react, is it ok you cna show me what it is?
Oh!...Uh, alrite! Because you promised!
She seemed a bit hesitant, but in the end shoves the paper into your hand anyway.
What? It's a letter...addressed to YOU!
Greetings, Nile Gerds

We are to inform you that a brand new android: SUNE-02, 
is to be arrived at 9pm sharp, at platform 6-7
Please ensure that the package is safe, secured, and most importantly, undamaged.
You may youse the facility's EZ-CART to bring the package safely to storage 6.
Please enable EZ-CART's automated driver when operating it.

Every EZ-CART are equipped wih a complete manual in the glovebox
that may helped you if needed.

Regards, 
Slife of Life Inc.

Uh, ok! Standard procedure, ye ye ye... Uh huh, yapping as usual..
Uh yea, Suni, I don't see anything wrong here? What were you dying from bruh.
Uh...Because I don't know who this is ?!?
The new android?
Y-Yeah! What else?!?

Uh...heh, what? Is she like... a super weapon of mass destruction
 that'll...like, kill us lol?
YOU GOTTA BE-Look. Here.
Suni pokes at the letter, to the new androi's name.
They're going to replace ME! With that...THAT THING!!!

Wha-WHAT! No way! Why do you think that?
All of my behavioral report always says you have MASSIVE aura,
a-and is a SIGMA android!!!

You gotta be kidding me! IT'S SO OBVIOUS! LOOK! The code name don't lie!
What's SUNE-02? You see it? 02!!! DO YOU SEE THE NUMBAH 2?!? IM SUNE-01!!!
UHHHH...UHHH!!!
Ok! SUNI! It could mean ANYTHING!!!
Uh..HUH! LIKE?
Like... well, maybe it's a test trial android!
W h a t

Like, if I recalled correctly... Uhhhh...
(shoot, I really should've locked in on that raining video ngl, I'm so cooked smh).

The company said new androids are subjected for... uh, test runs, yeh!
Around the facility! So...maybe it's not like a final thing!
Hmmm... so you're saying
Yeah! That we should wait and-
THAT WE CAN SABOTAGE THE OPERATION!!!
HUH!!! N-
Before you could question her, she left (RIP)
That-That means THEY'RE REPLACING ME!!!
Look...
Can you do something about this?!?
Uh..ok, I don't know much if I can really do much, but... I'll try?
Really...?
Well...
I think... I have an idea...
Suni left without another words. You are so cooked...
I...I'm sorry Suni... I don't really want any trouble...
Oh, OFC, you're scared of the, oooOOooOOooo HigHEr uPsssSss...

'Niwww, niw I diwn wann anwy trwoubleee...'
'OH YEAH! I'd even SACRIFICE my FRIEND for the JOB.' HAH, yeah right...
Suni! No! I-
I don't NEED your help! Stay in ur lil office and be a gud lil BOYE.
She left before you could say anything...
EVENING: 9PM SHARP
You went to platform 6-7 to inspect the package.
'There it is!' You thought
Your Rizzerometer beeps, as if this is a very important moment...?
The EZ-CART picked up the package easily, and carefully drove to storage 6.
'Tsk, nice!' You say to no one particular.
Hewo :P
WOAH! Suni! Ya sneaky dog! or fox! lol
Hehe...So! You remember the plan I mentioned?
Uh...UHhhhhhhhhh (you forgor again bruh?)
Uh... yeah, you had an idea?
YEAH! SABOTAGE THE NEW ANDROID!!!

Oh...that...
UHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH
YEAHH LESSGOO
YEAHHHHHH! DONT WORRY!!! It's a harmless prank, I'm sure of it!
Something to show them that it's 'defective' and you can write a report about it!
And that'll force a 'return to sender' kinda thing! Lelelele
...Also...
If I were to risk your job... who am I gonna hangout with?!?
Certainly not some ol sussy baka who don't understand 67???
Heh, yeah! Those who knows ehehehe~
HAHAH yeh THOS WHO NKNOWS 676767676767 eleleleleleleleelel

choices.label: Shift's over! Time to punch out!

lines.text: Ok...but, I don't think that's a good idea...

Ugh, realy? Im in a good mood you know! It's not even dangerous bruh!
I'm not that kinda perso-android!
If you say so...

choices.label: Shift's over! Time to punch out!

lines.text: You suddenly hear a loud SCREEECH!!!
WHAT THE HEEELLL NAHHH?!?
Is that...SUNI?!?
EHAHEHEHEHHAHHAHAHAHAH EZ-CART IS INDEED EZ...
EZ TO EXPLODE. YOU. ALL!!!
W-WAIT SUNIII!!!
REEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE

Suni doesn't care about you and crashed her EZ-CART with yours,
and sets a devastating chain of EXPLOSION that destroyed eveything.

RIP GG bruh...
You should've know better to not poke the bear... or fox...
You and Suni prepared a harmless prank, a classic: bucket above the door prank.
HEHEHEHHEH, annnnddd done! I think that android should activate like...idk, a moment?

Ermmm...ACKSHUALLY, according to my memory *SHNIFF + adjusts glasses* you took:
approximately 5 minutes since placed in storage. So!
My hypothesis is that thay will wake up in... 67 seconds. *shniff*

Wow nerd much breh? Ok, all I know is that, when it gets soaked,
we'll all be standing there aura farming while that thing gets rekked eheheheh
TAKE THAT CLANKER AHAHAHAHAHAHHAHEeheheheheheeeeee
Hehe, uh, you're...really excited to see they go huh? No chance at all...?
YEAH!!! No ones REPLACING ME!!!
The Rizzeromometer beeps, prompting you to look at it.
HEHEHEHEHE HERE IT COMEEESSSSS

A whirring sound suddenly fills the silence.
Light dainty footsteps can be heard, slowly approaching your door.
You and Suni both, waited in anticipation...
Hello! My name is SUNI-02, I am the android sent by Slife of Life.
My sole purpose here, is to hel-
TAKE THIS YOU SUSSY SOYJACK BAKA!!!

Due to how the bucket was positioned, it fell with a hard clang,
instead of pouring the water.

It hits SUNI-02 right on the head with the bottom of the bucket,
before proceeding to spill all over, further sizzling the new android to a crisp.
DOUBLE KO

You.
Are so cooked.
OH SHOOT!
Suni ran away, abandoning her friend, RIP x2
MY JOBBBBBBBBBB!!!

You're fired... what did you expect for meddling with the new android?!?
'All that is necessary for the triumph of evil is that good men do nothing.' gg smh
---Jobless---
The Rizzeromometer beeps, prompting you to look at it.
No, you need to do something!!!
Uh Suni... Look, I think we are a bit too quick about this...?

Shouldn't we ask them first? Like, why are you here? What's your purpose...?
That kinda thing?
You GOTTA be KIDDING me!
Well! I just... aren't you curious too? Why they're really here??
Well....yeah..BUT! ITS TOO LATE HEHEHEEHHEH!!! HERE IT COMES!!!

A whirring sound suddenly fills the silence.
Light dainty footsteps can be heard, slowly approaching your door.

The Rizzeromometer beeps once again...
Why do you have a foreboding feeling abotu this?
You have to do something!
You step forward, but due to insufficient rizz, you hesitate. Bad idea! GG.
However, your movements surpprises the new android, causing her to stop.
The hunter has become the hunted, and you are now the bucket's victim.

Due to how the bucket was positioned, it fell with a hard clang,
instead of pouring the water.

Due to how the bucket was positioned, it fell with a hard clang,
instead of pouring the water.
NOOOOO NIGHT GUARD-KUN!!!
W-What's going on?!?
The last thing you heard, were the two android's panicked screamming.

Well... It seems like your paycheck for the month go to the hospital bill...
Hey, at least you get to keeep your job! Going all out like that to protect them!

Though you do get a slap on the wirst for following with Suni's prank idea.
You do hope Suni and the new android get along while you're recovering tho...
---Traumatic brain injury---
The Rizzeromometer beeps once again, maybe it's your lucky night?
You gotta do something!
You ran forward bravely, pushing the new android back!
The android fell safely with an oomf

You, not so much, as you avoided the bucket initially.
But with a vengeance, the bucket managed to slashed you completely!
ARGH ayyya....great... Im WET
Ah! Uh, um... um... are you ok?

Huh? Oh no! Uh, this is a bad first impression eh? Nice to meet you!
I'm Nile Gerds!
Ah, hah... Night Guard! Like the job right? Hehe
Oh haha well it's actually Nile Ge-
Nice to meet you too! Night Guard-san!

Ahem-
Hello! My name is SUNI-02, I am the android sent by Slife of Life.
My sole purpose here, is to help as the facility's janitor.
W-WHAT?
Huh...? Suni! And you were sooo worried all over for nothing!
Suni? Well that's a nice name, I hope we can get along as fellow rizzers!

HUH!?!? Oh ME? Uh... Y-you too ig *blushes* (OwO aaauuwooo so embarasing!
I really though I was going to be replaced!)
(ME, a much more superior model!!!)
Hahahaha Suni I can you blushing hehehe~
S-SHUT UP B-BAKA
Hihihi

SUNI-02 giggled softly, sounding surpisingly like a real fox.
WHAT DOES THE FOX SAY?!?

The room fills with sounds of fox giggles.
It really works out in the end huh? Phewie
Your Rizzeromometer suddenly beeps loudly!
It's filled to the brim with powerful rizz!!!
This is truly...
A Night of Rizzing
---The Rizzler---
